name: Sara Lee's Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: Sugar cookies, Unflavored gelatin (1 package), and Sugar (1/4 cup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Place butter in a 9-inch square pan and heat until melted.
3. Combine the crumbs with the gelatin and sugar. Reserve 1/4 cup of crumbs for garnish.
4. Stir the remaining crumb mixture into the melted butter, spreading it evenly over the bottom of the pan.
5. Bake for exactly 8 minutes.
6. Mix cream cheese and sour cream until light and fluffy. Beat in butter, cornstarch, eggs, sugar, and vanilla.
7. Remove the pan from the oven and place an oven rack on top without removing the pan.
8. Pour the filling over the hot crust.
9. Sprinkle the reserved crumb mixture on top.
10. Return to the oven and bake for 30 to 35 minutes or until a knife inserted comes out clean. Do not overbake.
11. Let cool for 30 minutes before cutting.
